sections.label: Intro
lines: (Spoken) "Rest in the quiet... find your peace."

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Do not envy the fleeting, their treasures will fade,
Like grass that withers, in shadows, they’re laid.
Trust in the stillness, the unseen will rise,
The meek will inherit, under starlit skies.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Be still, hold fast, the storm will wane,
Delight in the truth, through joy or pain.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rest in the arms of time,
The righteous glow, the stars align.
Fret no more, the dark gives way,
To endless dawn, a brighter day.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Evil may prosper, for a fleeting hour,
But justice looms with quiet power.
Step in the light, let go of fear,
The pure in heart, their path is clear.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Be still, hold fast, the storm will wane,
Delight in the truth, through joy or pain.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rest in the arms of time,
The righteous glow, the stars align.
Fret no more, the dark gives way,
To endless dawn, a brighter day.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Even in shadows, their schemes will fail,
The righteous endure where others pale.
Look to the heavens, the promise remains,
A fire within, untamed by chains.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Rest in the arms of time,
The righteous glow, the stars align.
Fret no more, the dark gives way,
To endless dawn, a brighter day.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (Spoken) "Through stillness, we rise..."
